name: bandit.active_outside_dogpile_block_live
description: Fixture-backed camp-map product proof: a scout-confirmed remembered lead is evaluated through the real 30-minute live dispatch cadence while the camp already has unresolved outbound stalk pressure. The camp must reject a new dogpile dispatch and preserve the existing active outside group instead of spawning another one.
artifact_patterns: camp-map roster living=5 ready_at_home=3 wounded_or_unready=0 active_outside=2 reserve=2 dispatchable=1
hold: unresolved active outside group/contact blocks dogpile
camp-map dispatch blocked: remembered risk/reward decision held pressure

steps.label: post_load_active_outside_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the active-outside dogpile-block fixture; this proves only startup/load and fixture footing before the cadence wait
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later dogpile-block evidence cannot be credited.

steps.label: preflight_saved_active_outside_pressure
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the five-member roster with two unresolved outside stalk members plus a remembered camp-map lead
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains a five-member camp with two already-outbound stalk members, three still ready at home, and a scout-confirmed remembered lead before live cadence proof starts
steps.failure_rule: If the active-outside footing is missing, a later dogpile rejection cannot be credited as live active-pressure blocking.

steps.label: wait_30_minutes_for_active_outside_dogpile_block_cadence
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu
artifact_state_patterns: hold: unresolved active outside group/contact blocks dogpile
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through the real 30-minute overmap NPC cadence window; feature credit depends on same-run debug artifact lines proving active-outside dogpile blocking, not on the wait UI alone
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks the active-outside dogpile-block rejection, this scenario is inconclusive/red.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_active_outside_block
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the active-outside dogpile-block probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit cannot be opened, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as a clean saved-state proof.

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_active_outside_block
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the active-outside dogpile-block probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit confirmation is unproven, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as fully green without reviewing cleanup status.

steps.label: audit_saved_active_outside_dogpile_block
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world did not preserve the expected dogpile-block state: the original two active outside members remained and no extra dispatch was spawned
steps.expected_immediate_state: after save/quit, saved bandit_live_world still has exactly two active outside stalk members and three ready at home; the cadence did not create another active pressure group
steps.failure_rule: If active outside count changes or a different active group appears, same-run rejection logs cannot close dogpile-block proof by themselves.

steps.label: audit_active_outside_dogpile_block_artifact
required_line_patterns: camp-map roster living=5 ready_at_home=3 wounded_or_unready=0 active_outside=2 reserve=2 dispatchable=1
hold: unresolved active outside group/contact blocks dogpile
camp-map dispatch blocked: remembered risk/reward decision held pressure
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show remembered-lead source, active-outside roster inputs, and held pressure instead of a new dispatch
steps.failure_rule: No active-outside dogpile-block guardrail credit if the artifact lacks the named hold line from the same run.

evidence_contract.claim: a remembered camp-map lead evaluated while unresolved outside pressure already exists is held through the real live cadence rather than spawning another dogpile dispatch
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for active-outside dogpile-block behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, saved preflight active outside pressure, real wait/cadence action, same-run dogpile-block artifact, save/writeback, and saved unchanged active-outside state are not all green/matched.
